issue.title: GitClaw proactive repo-hygiene 2026-07-06
issue.body:
<!-- gitclaw:proactive-run name="repo-hygiene" slot="2026-07-06" -->
GitClaw proactive run.

- name: repo-hygiene
- slot: 2026-07-06

Proactive instruction:

<!-- gitclaw:proactive-skills repo-reader -->

Suggested GitClaw skills for this scheduled job:
- repo-reader

Run a short, read-only repository hygiene check.

Look for visible GitClaw maintenance work that would be useful to mention in
this issue thread: failing recent workflow context already present in the
conversation, stale implementation notes, missing tests for the current feature,
or spec gaps that should be turned into a follow-up issue.

Do not modify files, create branches, or claim that you inspected private state
that was not provided in the issue or repository context. Keep the response
concise and include concrete next steps only when they are supported by the
visible context.
issue.author: github-actions[bot]
